description_long: This is an upright piano with a classic rectangular form, finished in a sleek black color with gold accents on the front panel, keyboard trim, and pedals. The piano features a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and two gold pedals at the base. The front panel above the keyboard displays a circular gold emblem, adding a touch of elegance. The back of the piano is plain and solid, while the sides are straight and unadorned, emphasizing its robust construction. The top lid is flat and appears to be fully closed, with no visible hinges or openings. The overall design suggests durability and a traditional aesthetic suitable for public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A black upright piano with gold accents, a full keyboard, and two pedals, featuring a circular gold emblem above the keys. The design is classic and robust, with a closed flat lid and no visible music stand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the piano's depth, flat top, and the protruding keyboard section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full keyboard, two gold pedals, and a circular gold emblem above the keys.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the piano's depth and solid side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel with a gold trim along the top edge.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
